member.name: M:AttendanceSystem.API.Controllers.AttendanceController.CheckIn(AttendanceSystem.API.Controllers.CheckInRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Records employee check-in with optional GPS.

member.name: M:AttendanceSystem.API.Controllers.AttendanceController.Today(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns today's attendance for the current employee.

member.name: M:AttendanceSystem.API.Controllers.AttendanceController.Statistics(System.Nullable{System.DateOnly},System.Nullable{System.DateOnly},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns attendance statistics for the current month.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.API.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Authentication endpoints for JWT login and refresh.

member.name: M:AttendanceSystem.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(AttendanceSystem.Application.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates user and returns JWT tokens.

member.name: M:AttendanceSystem.API.Controllers.AuthController.Refresh(AttendanceSystem.API.Controllers.RefreshTokenRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Refreshes access token using refresh token.
